title: Overworld Quartz
description: Dead simple forge mod for overworld quartz.
body:
Requires FORGE

Makes Quartz ore generate in the overworld. Slightly less common than in the nether by default.

In 1.19.2+ ore generation is configured via datapacks, so for an example on how to do that you can look inside the .jar of the mod (version 1.1.2.0+) or here https://stackoverflow.com/questions/75122661/minecraftforge-1-19-3-ore-generation-java-edition

1.18.2 and below in "config/overworld_quartz-common.toml"

FAQ

Q: Forge?
A: Forge.

Q: Can I include your mod in a video?

A: As long as you include a link to the mod/modpack (if it happens to be in one), absolutely

If anyone wants an easier way to chat or ask questions here's a Discord link: https://discord.gg/sKwS3c62uM
